probes.name: session-tables-migrated
probes.description: The `sessions` + `session_attendance` tables exist with the latest schema.

probes.name: session-tenant-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every sessions.tenant_id + session_attendance.tenant_id resolves to a live tenants row.

probes.name: session-resource-booking-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every sessions.resource_booking_id resolves to a live resource_bookings row + the booking's tenant matches the session's tenant + the booking's facility.branch matches the session's branch.

probes.name: session-attendance-count-drift
probes.description: Denormalised checked_in_athletes_count + absent_athletes_count on sessions match the actual counts in session_attendance. Populated by ReconcileAttendanceCountsJob.

probes.name: session-slug-uniqueness
probes.description: No two active sessions share (tenant_id, slug) when slug is set.

probes.name: session-booking-unique
probes.description: One session per resource_booking. Verifies the partial unique index.

probes.name: session-start-heartbeat
probes.description: StartScheduledSessionsJob ran successfully within the last 30 minutes (5-min cadence + 25-min grace).

probes.name: session-complete-heartbeat
probes.description: CompleteFinishedSessionsJob ran successfully within the last 30 minutes.

probes.name: session-safeguarding-flag-integrity
probes.description: Every safeguarding_incident_flag=true session has session_notes IS NOT NULL AND a matching audit_events row with critical severity. Failure indicates a broken safeguarding audit chain — critical because it's regulator-facing.

probes.name: session-purge-queue-drained
probes.description: No PurgeCompletedSessionsJob has been pending for > 48h.

probes.name: session-inbound-fk-drift
probes.description: No session_attendance row references a hard-deleted session (should never happen due to CASCADE FK; probe catches raw SQL drift).
